ogTitle: Maslin Beach vs Matta Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maslin Beach and Matta Flat.
heading: Maslin Beach vs Matta Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maslin Beach, South Australia and Matta Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maslin Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Matta Flat (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maslin Beach or Matta Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maslin Beach has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Matta Flat scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maslin Beach scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Matta Flat scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maslin Beach or Matta Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maslin Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
